modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer freezing with popups and high disk usage issues

full_description_text:  
El usuario reporta que su computadora se está congelando y muestra múltiples ventanas emergentes. No puede acceder a Task Manager y el sistema no responde al intentar abrir documentos o conectarse a internet. Además, la máquina está atascada en la pantalla de inicio de sesión y muestra un uso del disco del 100%, lo que retrasa la apertura de aplicaciones.
